reports.name: Attendance
Not Attending
reports.query:
SELECT e.BadgeNumber,
       e.NAME
FROM Employee AS e
WHERE ISNULL(e.DeletedFromDevice,0) = 0
AND PositionId = 1
  AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM dbo.Attendance AS a
        WHERE a.BadgeNumber = e.BadgeNumber
          AND a.Status = 'Check-In'
          AND a.VerifyTime > {{FromDate}} OR a.VerifyTime = {{FromDate}}
          AND a.VerifyTime < DATEADD(DAY,1,{{ToDate}})
  );
